text: I feel a curious sense of anticipation as I enter this modern, almost clinical space. The clean lines and bright lights evoke a feeling of clarity but also a certain sterility. I am aware of my own presence as an observer, somewhat detached, yet drawn to the displays ahead. My mind is tuning into the promise of discovery, nudged by the interplay of precision and creativity that the 'R + D' wall suggests. It feels like standing at the threshold of inquiry, poised between comfort and the unknown.
